title: Product Manager
description:
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

Product Strategy & Vision:

  • Engage agency Product Owner to establish clear product vision and requirements
  • Collaborate with business partners to define product vision/mission and obtain stakeholder buy-in
  • Define product go-to-market strategy and execute with relevant partners
  • Develop product outreach and promotion strategies
  • Maintain strategic roadmaps aligned with organizational objectives

Product Development & Management:

  • Design, test, and iterate through experiments to improve user journey
  • Manage product budget (expenditure monitoring, cashflow management, securing funding)
  • Develop workplan with product team and provide sufficient resources
  • Procure software, hardware, and ICT professional services as needed
  • Oversee product releases and deployment coordination

Product Operations & Maintenance:

  • Monitor product performance metrics and system health indicators
  • Coordinate ongoing maintenance activities and system updates
  • Manage product lifecycle including feature deprecation and retirement
  • Establish and maintain service level agreements with stakeholders
  • Oversee incident response and resolution processes for product issues
  • Implement continuous improvement processes based on operational feedback
  • Manage vendor relationships for ongoing support and maintenance services
  • Ensure product documentation is current and accessible to relevant teams

User Research & Analytics:

  • Conduct user studies to understand needs and problems
  • Analyze data to uncover usage patterns for product decisions
  • Research industry for complementary and competing solutions
  • Create data-driven analytics and insights for decision-making
  • Monitor user satisfaction and engagement metrics

Cross-functional Coordination:

  • Translate product strategy into technical, actionable plans for business and vendor teams
  • Coordinate efforts across marketing, legal, and finance functions
  • Co-create budget papers with Product Owner to seek development resources
  • Run efficient meetings and maintain stakeholder communication
  • Formulate strong proposals by evaluating pros and cons of different solutions and provide compelling justifications
  • Consider how services could be delivered for different user segments and prioritise feature development

Growth & Compliance:

  • Drive user adoption and growth through engagement and feature expansion
  • Maintain network with user agencies and product teams
  • Ensure products meet security/performance requirements (SSAT, VAPT, Performance Testing)
  • Adhere to compliance requirements and audits (IM, AGO, QMS)
  • Participate in engagements to raise product awareness

MANDATORY REQUIREMENTS:

Education & Experience:

  • Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering or related field
  • Minimum 8 years relevant experience in product management
  • Prior experience in IT business analysis, application solution design and testing
  • Experience working directly with engineers, designers, and product teams
  • Proven track record of delivering successful products from scratch
  • Experience in product operations and maintenance activities

Technical Skills:

  • Strong product and project management capabilities
  • Proficiency in modern product development practices (Agile, Cloud, Design Thinking)
  • Strong analytical, conceptualization and problem-solving skills
  • Budget management and resource planning experience
  • Understanding of system monitoring and operational excellence practices

Personal Qualities:

  • Action-oriented mindset with innovation focus
  • Growth mindset and continuous learning attitude
  • Strong sense of ownership and accountability
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
  • Ability to balance innovation with operational stability

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:

  • Healthcare industry knowledge
  • Digital transformation background
  • Experience with public health or communicable disease systems
  • DevOps or Site Reliability Engineering exposure
  • Experience with cloud platforms and modern infrastructure
